prompt_text: ActiveCampaign vs HubSpot pricing and features
response:
# ActiveCampaign vs HubSpot: Pricing & Features Comparison

## Pricing Overview

### ActiveCampaign
- **Lite**: $15/month (automation, basic CRM)
- **Plus**: $70/month (advanced automation, lead scoring)
- **Professional**: $229/month (custom objects, advanced reporting)
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing
- *Contact management: Typically 1,000 to 100,000+ contacts*

### HubSpot
- **Starter**: $50/month (basic CRM, email)
- **Professional**: $800/month (workflows, custom objects)
- **Enterprise**: $3,200+/month (advanced features)
- *Contact limits: Typically higher across tiers*

**Winner**: ActiveCampaign for budget-conscious; HubSpot for all-in features

---

## Key Features Comparison

| Feature | ActiveCampaign | HubSpot |
|---------|---|---|
| **Email Marketing** | Strong | Strong |
| **Marketing Automation** | Excellent | Excellent |
| **CRM** | Solid | Excellent |
| **Landing Pages** | Limited | Included |
| **Lead Scoring** | Yes (most tiers) | Professional+ |
| **Sales Tools** | Good | Excellent |
| **Customer Service/Ticketing** | Yes | Yes |
| **Integration Library** | 1000+ | 500+ |
| **Learning Curve** | Moderate | Easier |
| **Support Quality** | Good | Excellent |

---

## Core Strengths

### ActiveCampaign
✓ Better for automation power-users  
✓ More affordable entry price  
✓ Flexible contact-based pricing  
✓ Excellent API for customization  

### HubSpot
✓ Beginner-friendly interface  
✓ Better sales & customer service tools  
✓ Superior onboarding & support  
✓ Stronger ecosystem & training  

---

## Which to Choose?

| Choose **ActiveCampaign** if: | Choose **HubSpot** if: |
|---|---|
| Budget is tight | You want all-in-one platform |
| Need advanced automation | Prefer ease of use |
| Prefer technical customization | Want premium support |
| Managing small-medium contacts | Need enterprise features |

**Bottom line**: ActiveCampaign wins on **value & automation**; HubSpot wins on **usability & integrated sales tools**.
